The company plans and manages public auctions and Internet public auctions focusing on art works and jewelry; operates an art trade gallery; develops and sells solar power plants; imports and sells coconut husk; sells asset defense diamonds; and buys, manages, rents, and sells real estate properties. It also engages in insurance, microfinance, cultural support, and virtual currency block chain trading activities, as well as undertakes afforestation projects and support projects for medical institutions. The company was formerly known as Shinwa Art Auction Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Shinwa Wise Holdings Co.,Ltd. in December 2017. Shinwa Wise Holdings Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Asukanet Co., Ltd.
summary: Asukanet Co., Ltd. provides personal publishing, memorial design, and aerial imaging services in Japan. The company offers personalized photobooks in small lots, such as book by on-demand printing, as well as related software development; funeral photographs for funeral companies and homes; and aerial display related services. Asukanet Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Hiroshima, Japan.

name: Gurunavi, Inc.
summary: Gurunavi, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides Web-based information services related to restaurants through PC and smartphones in Japan. The company also offers Internet-based PR and marketing support services to restaurants in China. In addition, it provides food-related research and information services; administrative outsourcing and welfare services; and support services related to the management of restaurants. The company was incorporated in 1989 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Takamiya Co., Ltd.
summary: Takamiya Co., Ltd. sells and rents temporary equipment and materials for the construction sites in Japan and internationally. It operates through Rental Business, Overseas Business, and Sales Business segments. The company's temporary equipment include YT lock system that can be erected along slopes, as well as used as a gantry; VMAX, a hanging-type scaffolding that is used for bridge repair; G Walk, a catwalk panel with fewer gaps to prevent stumbling and falling objects; and dimple post X, which protects the safety and lives of workers while they are under the beams for work, including steel construction and ridge beam operations. Its temporary equipment also includes clamps, a bolted fastening-type metal fittings; standing bear that enables safe assembly and disassembly; power frame, a wedge-type support system that fits the shape of a structure flexibly; lift climber, a mechanical scaffold for skyscrapers; Iq systems; and AL-speeders. In addition, the company provides stainless steel column formwork; building and agricultural materials; and environmental equipment, such as echo barrier, a soundproof sheet that reduces noise by absorbing sound, and H2 systems. Further, it plans and draws temporary construction. The company was formerly known as SRG Takamiya Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Takamiya Co., Ltd. in April 2019. Takamiya Co., Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

name: PRAP Japan, Inc.
summary: PRAP Japan, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a public relations consultancy company in Japan. The company provides crisis communications support services; purpose-built media training studio services; event management; and digital influence services. The company serves healthcare, finance, energy, automobiles, culture/fashion/art, travel and retail, food and restaurants, and information technology industries. PRAP Japan, Inc. was founded in 1970 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Japan Best Rescue System Co.,Ltd.
summary: Japan Best Rescue System Co.,Ltd. provides various services to the real estate companies, casualty insurance companies, housing manufacturers, and homebuilding companies in Japan. It provides living emergencies services; and problem-solving services, such as keys, water, windows, and computers, as well as operates call centers. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

name: All About, Inc.
summary: All About, Inc. engages in the Internet advertising business. It is also involved in the portal site operation, sampling, and learning business. In addition, the company engages in the operation of Facebook navi, a social media related business; citrus, a decentralized media platform; Tsui Navi, a Twitter navigation site; and DL market, a platform for buying and selling digital contents. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: LIKE Co., Ltd.
summary: LIKE Co., Ltd. provides a range of human resource services in Japan. The company's services include temporary staffing, outsourcing, recruitment, and recruitment and educational support; and outsourced and public childcare services. It also operates nursing homes that offer nursing care related services. The company was formerly known as J-COM Holdings Co., Ltd. and changed its name to LIKE Co., Ltd. in December 2016. LIKE Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

name: FueTrek Co., Ltd.
summary: FueTrek Co., Ltd. provides speech recognition, speech dialogue, speech synthesis, and machine translation technologies and solutions in Japan. The company offers vGate ASR, a speech recognition system; vGate TTS, a speech synthesis product; vGate Talk2Me, a speech dialogue system; and speech translation system, as well as Dictation Editor, a transcription software. It also provides sound generator IP, Voice Memo and Voice UI application, and speech recognition ASP services. In addition, the company offers image media solutions, including TV programs and other imaging production, as well as CRM system and system development businesses. It provides the solution for various markets and industries comprising car navigation system/telematics, home appliances/smart homes, inspection/manufacturing/logistics, sales visit/negotiation records, SFA transcription of lectures/meeting minutes, mobile device UI, advertising/marketing, contact center solutions, deployment support services, and operation and maintenance services. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

name: Hibino Corporation
summary: Hibino Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, designs, sells, installs, and maintains of audio equipment in Japan and internationally. The company also designs and installs architectural acoustics; develops, manufactures, and sells acoustic products; and provides sound and vibration, survey, and measurement consulting services. In addition, it plans, operates, and rents audio and video systems for events; dispatches operators and engineers related to audio and video equipment and systems; designs, sells, installs, and maintains lighting equipment for business use; and design and installs industrial noise countermeasures. Further, the company develops, manufactures, and sells industrial noise control products; operates a live house under the Kennedy House Ginza name and a live music club; and sells LED displays and peripheral equipment. It primarily serves professionals and consumers, as well as movie theaters and halls. The company was formerly known as Hibino Electro Sound Inc. and changed its name to Hibino Corporation in June 1988. Hibino Corporation was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: WDB Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: WDB Holdings Co., Ltd. provides human resource services in Japan. The company offers placement and dispatching services for research and development in the biopharma and chemical sectors; and specified dispatching services for research and development in the engineering sectors. It also provides safety information management support services; data management and statistical analysis for clinical trials/post marketing surveillance; and consulting services and dossier preparation for product-registrarion services. In addition, the company offers clinical trial services in pharmacovigilance and analytics; clinical monitoring, data management, statistical analysis, and safety information management support services; research and development services in drug discovery research; and custom synthetic services for drug discovery research. Further, it develops and manufactures an assortment of devices, including gas-assist injection molding machines, nitrogen generators, and bio-related devices. WDB Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Himeji, Japan.

name: Temairazu, Inc.
summary: Temairazu, Inc. develops and operates comparison and reservation sites. It operates TEMAIRAZU and comparison.com. The company was formerly known as Hikaku.com Corporation and changed its name to Temairazu, Inc. in October 2017. Temairazu, Inc. was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: JTEC Corporation
summary: JTEC Corporation engages in technical intellectual property leasing business in Japan and internationally. It offers machinery design and development, electrical and electronic design and development, and employment placement services. The company also engages in the software development, including embedded system software, packaged software, open system, smartphone application, general-purpose machine system, cloud system, communication network, and Web system. In addition, it is involved in the development of integrated core system for business management; Web application development; and Web site construction and other activities. Further, the company offers various technical, technical training, and consulting services. JTEC Corporation was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: System Location Co.,Ltd.
summary: System Location Co.,Ltd. provides business support solutions for finance companies in Japan and internationally. It offers solutions for auto lease, new car sales support, and collective evaluation for present value. The company was formerly known as Dormant Company Pine Co., Ltd. and changed its name to System Location Co.,Ltd. in July 1992. System Location Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Townnews-Sha Co.,Ltd.
summary: Townnews-Sha Co.,Ltd. engages in the publishing business in Japan. It issues Town News, a local information paper. The company is also involved in the planning, production, and printing of various printed materials, such as postcards, business cards, and shop menu; and offers advertisement placement services. In addition, it publishes commemorative magazines and guidebooks; and plans and operates Websites, which include Political village, a database site introducing all politicians in Kanagawa prefecture and Rare A, a community-based event information site. Townnews-Sha Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

name: Honyaku Center Inc.
summary: Honyaku Center Inc. provides translation services in Japan and internationally. It offers translation for patent documents comprising application-related, court-related, and others; and medical documents, including basic research/non-clinical development, clinical development, regulatory submission, and post-marketing. The company also provides financial and legal translations comprising performance disclosure materials related, and corporate and other documents; and translation services for IT related documents and manuals, and game-comics-related documents. In addition, it offers translation of industrial documents, such as R&D, planning, and design documents; production, quality assurance, implementation, and maintenance service documents; sales and marketing documents; and non-manufacturing industry related documents. Further, the company provides medical writing, grammar check, transcription, staffing, multilingual contact center, and foreign patent application services, as well as services related to computer games, e-learning, and Websites; and prepares drawings. Additionally, it offers translation services for documents required to apply for marriage, work, residency, study abroad, and other visas; and DTP, printing, document, and e-book translation related services, as well as press releases and newsletters, and presentation documents. The company serves clients in a range of industries, such as automotive, machinery, electronics, medical and pharmaceutical, patent, legal, accounting, government, education, R&D, and others. Honyaku Center Inc. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

name: Demae-Can Co.,Ltd
summary: Demae-Can Co., Ltd operates delivery site Demae-can in Japan. The company provides food delivery service that enables its users to order from a range of restaurants. It also sells bottles of shochu, wine, and other beverages then to restaurants. The company was formerly known as Yume no Machi Souzou Iinkai Co., Ltd. Demae-Can Co., Ltd was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

name: Tear Corporation
summary: Tear Corporation provides funeral services in Japan. The company operates funeral centers primarily in Chubu, Kansai, and Kanto districts. It also offers subcontracting funeral and legal requirements at the hall, as well as funeral and legal requirements at temples, private homes, and public places; and follow-ups according to the consultation content of the bereaved families. Tear Corporation was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

name: JTP Co.,Ltd.
summary: JTP CO.,Ltd. provides outsourced technical services to technology companies in Japan. The company offers integration services, including consultation, system design and integration, system development, operation and maintenance, helpdesk, and supply chain management for users; and training program for enterprises. It also provides training services, such as delivering training programs, preparing and cultivating training staff, promoting training programs, rental lesson venues, and localizing course materials. In addition, the company offers medical devices support services comprising medical device repairs and maintenance, substitute device, sales support, technological implementation support, and help desk; and analytical instruments solutions, which consists of technical support on delivery, maintenance, help desk, equipment and software localization, and lab management system, as well as IT skill assessments. Further, it engages in the development of custom application; sale and rental of robots; importing and localization; and provision of robotics business consulting, and technical support services. The company was formerly known as Japan Third Party Co., Ltd. and changed its name to JTP CO.,Ltd. in April 2021. JTP CO.,Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Adways Inc.
summary: Adways Inc. provides affiliate advertisement services for PC and mobiles, and mobile application and content development services in Japan, China, Taiwan, the Philippines, and the United States. The company offers Unicorn, a marketing platform for mobile apps; AppDriver, a CPI based mobile ad platform; STROBELIGHTS, an performance ad management platform; Oct-pass, a native ad platform for smart phones; Smart-C, a Web affiliate service for feature phone and smartphone; JANet, a Web affiliate service for PCs and smartphones; and YACLE, a supporting service for advertisement expressions. It also provides Dobel, a video advertisement service; MASSIVE, a service that realizes automated mass production of banners; CHANet, an affiliate ad service for PC and smart phones; Keynet, a keyword ad service for Chinese web search engines; Blue Bee Box, a DSP trading desk tool. Blue Bee Native, a CPM based native ad network; adna, an ad analytics tool for PC, feature phone, and smart phone websites; and Rewardplus, a reward ad service for PC and mobile. In addition, the company offers Yoyaku Top10, a pre-registration platform for smart phone apps; SPOT, an online media that delivers going out and sightseeing information based on writers' experiences and interviews; and Leyifan, an international shipping agent service for overseas e-commerce users. Adways Inc. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: ValueCommerce Co., Ltd.
summary: ValueCommerce Co., Ltd. provides marketing solutions in Japan and internationally. The company develops and offers affiliate marketing services, including pay-per-performance advertising services; and Value Point Club, a cash-back program that allows users to shop top brands and earn points for purchases. It also offers EC solutions, such as STORE's R8, a CRM tool for stores in online shopping malls; Storematch, a service that provides pay-per-click Internet advertising for stores in online shopping malls and manufacturers; and B-Space, an EC operation support tool for e-commerce operators. The company was formerly known as Transpacific Inc. and changed its name to ValueCommerce Co., Ltd. in November 1999. The company was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. ValueCommerce Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Z Holdings Corporation.

name: Infomart Corporation
summary: Infomart Corporation operates an online business to business (BtoB) EC trading platform for the food industry in Japan. It offers BtoB platform matching, BtoB platform ordering, BtoB platform standards database, BtoB platform invoicing, BtoB platform quoting, BtoB platform contract, and BtoB platform industry news and data portal. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: UNITED, Inc.
summary: UNITED, Inc. engages in the ad-technology, content, and investment businesses in Japan. It offers Bypass, adstir, and Crash Fever ad technology services. The company also operates CHEERZ, a service to help artists activities; produces sports-related websites; plans and develops media; plans and operates gift sites; plans, develops, and operates TechAcademy, a Japan's online programming school; and provides consulting solutions to support digital transformation of companies. It is also involved in the venture capital investment business. UNITED, Inc. was founded in 1998 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Oriental Consultants Holdings Company Limited
summary: Oriental Consultants Holdings Company Limited engages in the infrastructure maintenance and preservation activities in Japan and internationally. It also provides disaster prevention, regional creation, traffic, and overseas development services. The company was formerly known as ACKG Limited and changed its name to Oriental Consultants Holdings Company Limited in December 2018. Oriental Consultants Holdings Company Limited was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Nihonwasou Holdings, Inc.
summary: Nihonwasou Holdings, Inc. engages in the management of Nihonwasou, Ito no Takumi Center, Nihonwasou Gijutsuin, Kimono Refresh Center, etc. It also provides educational guidance for kimono and sewing; brokerage of sales contracts for japanese clothes and accessories; tailoring and sewing of kimonos; and Kimono maintenance and sales promotion agency services. In addition, the company researches, develops, and sells kimono accessories. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Sapporo Holdings Limited
summary: Sapporo Holdings Limited engages in alcoholic beverages, foods and soft drinks, restaurants, and real estate businesses in Japan, North America, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Alcoholic Beverages, Food & Soft Drinks, and Real Estate. It produces and sells beer, low-malt beer, wine, western liquor, spirits, and other alcoholic beverages under the Black label, Yebisu, and Mugi to Hop brand names; and soft drinks that include fruit juices and coffee, lemon based favor products, soybeans and chilled products, bottled water, and food and soup products, as well as operates beer halls, cafes, and restaurants. The company also manages, leases, and operates office spaces, residential units, retail stores, restaurants, cultural facilities, and shopping and entertainment complex, as well as supplies energy. Further, it engages in the in-store merchandising/draft beer quality enhancement business; sale and marketing of beverages and foods; operation of vending machines and tea dispensers; manufacture and sale of ice cream, miso soups, and freeze-dried products; import, process, manufacture, and sale of spices, herbs and dehydrated vegetables; and provision of consigned freight forwarding, cargo handling, warehousing, packaging and distribution packaging, processing services, etc. As of March 31, 2020, it operated 189 restaurant outlets. The company sells its products primarily to retailers and wholesalers. Sapporo Holdings Limited was founded in 1876 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Asahi Group Holdings Ltd
summary: Asahi Group Holdings, Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells alcoholic beverages, soft drinks, and food products in Japan and internationally. It operates through Alcohol Beverages, Soft Drinks, Food, Overseas, and Others segments. The company offers alcoholic beverage products, including imported beers, non-alcohol beer taste beverages, wines, shochu and whiskey products, ready-to-drink beverages, happoshu products, and spirits. It also provides soft drink beverages, such as ciders, carbonated soda water beverages, coffee, tea, lactic acid drinks, mineral waters, sports drinks, and fruit juices. In addition, the company offers food products comprising confectioneries, health foods, supplements, yeast extracts, powdered milk products for infants and baby foods, skin care, and others; and freeze-dried foods, including miso and other soups, porridge, risotto, stews, bowls, pastas, and curries. It provides its products primarily under the Asahi Super Dry, Clear Asahi, Black Nikka, Asahi Dry Zero, Mitsuya Cider, Wilkinson, Wonda, Asahi Juroku-cha, Asahi Oishii Mizu, Calpis, Mintia, Dear-Natura, Peroni Nastro Azzurro, Pilsner Urquell, Cool Ridge, Schweppes, Asahi Gokujo Kire Aji, Wilkinson Highball, Asahi THE RICH, Prime Rich, Zeitaku Shibori, Style Free, Zeitaku Zero, Asahi Off, HATARAKU ATAMANI, WAKODO GLOBAL, Juhinmoku no Ippai, Carlton, Great Northern, Pirate Life, Lech Free, Kozel, Ksiazece, Captain Jack, Zubr, Tyskie, and Ippon Manzoku Bar brands. Further, it is involved in the operation of restaurants; and offers fertilizers, and microbiological and biochemical products. The company was formerly known as Asahi Breweries, Ltd. and changed its name to Asahi Group Holdings, Ltd. in July 2011. Asahi Group Holdings, Ltd. was founded in 1889 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Kirin Holdings Company, Limited
summary: Kirin Holdings Company, Limited produces and sells alcoholic beverages, soft drinks, pharmaceuticals, and other related products in Japan and internationally. It operates through four segments: Japan Beer and Spirits Businesses, Japan Non-Alcoholic Beverages Business, Oceania Integrated Beverages Business, and Pharmaceuticals Business. The company's products include beer, happo-shu, wine, whiskey, spirits, soft drinks, dairy products, fruit juices, and other products. It also produces and sells pharmaceutical products, biochemical products, and other products. In addition, the company engages in the feed and theme park businesses; management and operation of a chain of Kirin City beer pubs; and manufacture and sale of amino acids and nucleic acids for pharmaceutical and industrial use bulk pharmaceuticals, as well as margarine, jams, and honey. Further, it is involved in the manufacture and sale of Coca-Cola products and other soft drinks, and sake and other food products; as well as manufacture and supply of Four Roses bourbon; and acts as an insurance agent. The company was formerly known as Kirin Brewery Company, Limited and changed its name to Kirin Holdings Company, Limited in July 2007. Kirin Holdings Company, Limited was founded in 1885 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: TAKARA HOLDINGS INC.
summary: Takara Holdings Inc., together with its subsidiaries, primarily manufactures and sells alcoholic beverages, seasonings, and raw alcohol worldwide. The company offers shochu, sake, light-alcohol refreshers, seasonings, Japanese alcoholic beverages, and whisky; research reagents and scientific instruments; contract research services; and gene therapy commercialization services. It is involved in the import, export, and wholesale of alcoholic beverages, food products, seasonings, etc.; and printing, real estate leasing, marketing research, sales promotion planning, temporary staffing, transportation, warehousing, automobile service, non-life insurance agency, travel agent, etc. activities. In addition, the company engages in the wholesale of glass bottles; and sale of feed. Takara Holdings Inc. was founded in 1842 and is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.

name: Oenon Holdings, Inc.
summary: Oenon Holdings, Inc. develops alcoholic beverages, food products, enzymes and pharmaceuticals, real estate, and other businesses based on biotechnologies derived from fermentation technologies in Japan. The company offers alcoholic beverages, including shochu, chu-hi, sake, sake compounds, umeshu plum wine, processed liquor, wine, brewing and industrial alcohol, seasonings, and other products. It also manufacture and sell enzymes for food and industrial use comprising lactase, a lactose hydrolytic enzyme; cellulase, a dietary fiber processing enzyme; glucose isomelase, a fructose corn syrup manufacturing enzyme; protease, a proteolytic enzyme; dispase, a cell dispersion enzyme; and isoamylase, a starch processing enzyme. In addition, the company offers active pharmaceutical ingredients, such as Pravastatin for hyperlipidemia treatment; Voglibose for diabetes mellitus treatment; starch for food processing; and diagnostic medicines and health foods. Further, it sells and leases real estate properties. Additionally, the company engages in transportation and cargo handling, and other activities. Oenon Holdings, Inc. was incorporated in 1920 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Yomeishu Seizo Co., Ltd.
summary: Yomeishu Seizo Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells herbal liqueurs and pharmaceutical products in Japan. It offers Yomeishu, a herbal liqueur; Herb-no-Megumi, a liqueur made of various oriental herbs; and Kohaku ginger liqueur, a liqueur made of raw, steamed, and dried gingers and various herbs, such as gingko biloba and safflower. The company also provides fruit and herb liqueur products; HER herbs, a herb wine; Kajo Hon-Mirin ingredients oriented products; and Ururu-Vinegar before meals, a drink for dieting and beauty of women. In addition, it is involved in mail order business that delivers its health related products, including Koken Seisai, a quasi-pharmaceutical product related to herbal medicine. Further, the company operates CLASUWA, a commercial complex; buys, sells, borrows, brokerages, and manages real estate properties; and engages in the power generation, supply, and sale of electricity through natural energy. The company was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Hokkaido Coca-Cola Bottling Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hokkaido Coca-Cola Bottling Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells soft drinks in Hokkaido, Japan. The company was incorporated in 1940 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan. Hokkaido Coca-Cola Bottling Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Dai Nippon Printing Co., Ltd.

name: Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan Holdings Inc.
summary: Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan Holdings Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the purchasing, bottling, packaging, distributing, marketing, and selling of carbonated, coffee, and tea-based beverages, mineral water, and other soft drinks in Japan. It operates through Beverage Business and Healthcare & Skincare Business segments. The company offers its products under the Coca-Cola, Fanta, Sprite, Real Gold, Georgia, Aquarius, Qoo, Sokenbicha, Huang, and Kochakaden brands. It also manufactures and sells kale juice and other products, as well as health foods, cosmetics, and other related products. In addition, the company is involved in the operation of vending machines; and real estate, insurance agency, and investment businesses. Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan Holdings Inc. sells its products through supermarkets and convenience stores, vending machines, restaurants, kiosks, etc. The company was formerly known as Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan Inc. and changed its name to Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan Holdings Inc. in January 2018. Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan Holdings Inc. was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Fruta Fruta Inc.
summary: Fruta Fruta Inc. markets fruits and foods in Japan. Its products include mixed beverage, frozen puree, diet food, freeze dried powder, chocolate, sherbet, vinegar, and granola; and raw materials, such as ground pulp, condensed extracts, pulverized pulp, agroforestry cacao beans, OMEGA oil, various fruit seed oils, etc. The company sells its products through retail, wholesale, e-commerce, TV shopping, and mail-order, as well as it exports its products. Fruta Fruta Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Suntory Beverage & Food Limited
summary: Suntory Beverage & Food Limited, a soft drink company, manufactures and sells beverages and foods in Japan, Europe, rest of Asia, Oceania, and the Americas. The company offers mineral water, ready-to-drink (RTD) coffee, RTD tea, carbonated beverages, functional drinks, fruit juices, and processed food. It also provides health foods. The company sells its products under the Suntory Tennensui, Boss, Suntory Green Tea Iyemon, Suntory Iyemon Tokucha, Suntory Oolong Tea, Green DAKARA, Pepsi, Orangina, Dekavita C, C.C. Lemon, Natchan!, and Suntory Black Oolong Tea brand names. Suntory Beverage & Food Limited was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Suntory Beverage & Food Limited is a subsidiary of Suntory Holdings Limited.

name: DyDo Group Holdings, Inc.
summary: DyDo Group Holdings, Inc. provides various beverages in Japan, turkey, Malaysia, Russia, and China. It operates through Domestic Beverage Business, International Beverage Business, Pharmaceutical-Related Business, and Food Business segments. The company offers coffee under the DyDo Blend brand; and green tea, carbonated drinks, mineral water, juice based beverages, soups, and sweet bean porridges through its vending machines, as well as cut tea. It is also involved in the provision of fruit dessert jellies; and OEM production of energy drinks for manufacturers of pharmaceuticals and cosmetics. In addition, the company engages in the sale of chilled and soft drinks; production and sale of drinkable preparations, including medicines, quasi-medicines, etc.; and offers business processing services. The company was formerly known as DyDo DRINCO, INC. and changed its name to DyDo Group Holdings, Inc. in January 2017. DyDo Group Holdings, Inc. was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

name: ITO EN LTD NPV PRF STOCK TYPE 1
summary: ITO EN LTD NPV PRF STOCK TYPE 1 is a Japanese beverage company known for its tea products, particularly green tea. They are involved in the production, distribution, and sales of a wide range of tea and other beverage products. The company is headquartered in Japan.

name: Unicafe Inc.
summary: Unicafe Inc. engages in the production and sale of regular coffee and processed coffee products in Japan. It provides commercial coffee to various channels, such as restaurants, cafe shops, office coffee, and coffee vending machines; and industrial coffee that is used as a basic ingredient for coffee related products to beverage manufacturers and flavor companies. The company also offers Keurig, a capsule coffee system that offers professional drip coffee and tea through one machine. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: The Nisshin OilliO Group,Ltd.
summary: The Nisshin OilliO Group,Ltd. engages in oil and meal, processed oil and fat, fine chemical, and health science businesses in Japan, China, Taiwan, Malaysia, Singapore, Indonesia, and Europe. The company offers edible oil for use in household, commercial, and food processing applications; and oil meal, soy food, soy protein, dressings, and healthy food products, as well as foods for the elderly and nursing care patients, etc. It also provides margarines, shortenings, processed oil and fats, specialty fats, etc.; and fine chemicals, including medium-chain triglycerides, food ingredients, chemical products, and raw materials for cosmetics, etc. In addition, the company develops and sells functional raw materials for use in the fields of pharmaceuticals and industrial products; meals for food and livestock feed; and food for diet and lifestyle-related diseases. Further, it is involved in the logistics, information-related services, sales promotion, and insurance agency businesses. The company also imports and sells fine chemical products, including oil for industrial and cosmetic uses, MCTs, etc.; manufactures and sells palm oil and specialty fats, chocolate products for commercial use, and vegetable oil; and manufactures confectionery supplies. The Nisshin OilliO Group,Ltd. was founded in 1907 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Kadoya Sesame Mills Incorporated
summary: Kadoya Sesame Mills Incorporated engages in the development and sale of sesame oil products in Japan. The company offers cooking oil, such as pure, hot, and white sesame oil. It also provides edible seed products comprising sesame paste and roasted sesame seed; and sesame seed meal. The company offers its products for retail and food service/industrial uses. Its products are also used in general households and restaurants, as well as raw materials for processed food. Kadoya Sesame Mills Incorporated was founded in 1858 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Lawson, Inc.
summary: Lawson, Inc. operates and franchises convenience stores under the Lawson, Lawson Store 100, and Natural Lawson names in the People's Republic of China, Thailand, Indonesia, the Philippines, and the United States. It operates through Domestic Convenience Store Business, Seijo Ishii Business, Entertainment-Related Business, Financial Services Business, and Other Business segments. The company's stores provide ready-made dishes, including bento lunchboxes, rice balls, deep-fried items, salads, and soups, as well as coffee and sweets; and over-the-counter pharmaceuticals, prescription drugs, cosmetics, and daily necessities. It also sells tickets for events; and music CD and DVD products, and books through its stores, as well as online. In addition, the company engages in the operation of a chain of supermarkets; management of HMV stores; operation of United Cinemas movie theaters and MACHI caf√É¬©; and provision of payment services, as well as ATM at LAWSON stores. Further, the company engages in the banking related business. As of February 29, 2020, it operated 14,444 Lawson, Lawson Store 100, and Natural Lawson stores in Japan; 389 United Cinema movie theater screens at 43 locations; 57 HMV stores; 24 nursing care consultation stores; 13,353 LAWSON ATMs; 154 Seijo Ishii supermarket stores; and 323 Lawson hospitals. The company was formerly known as Daiei Convenience Systems, Co. Ltd. and changed its name to Lawson, Inc. in June 1996. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Tokyo Japan. Lawson, Inc. is a subsidiary of Mitsubishi Corporation.

name: Mandarake Inc.
summary: Mandarake Inc. manages old books and antique stores in Japan. The company provides comics/light novels, books, magazines, toys, dolls, doujins, disks/games, idols/voice actors, cards/stickers, anime cels/scripts, illustration signed books, art, and other products. It also edits and sells in-house publications. In addition, the company sells its products online. Mandarake Inc. was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Asmo Corporation
summary: Asmo Corporation imports and sells meat products. It provides meals in various fields, such as hospital meals, office meals, school meals, and welfare facility meals for the elderly. The company also offers nursing care services; manages 10 Japanese restaurants in Hong Kong; and provides insurance products. Additionally, it engages in trust business, such as management of property for the elderly and maintenance of lump-sum payment for paid elderly home. The company was founded in 1975 and is based in Tokyo, Japan. Asmo Corporation is a subsidiary of PersonsBridge Co., Ltd.

name: Cawachi Limited
summary: Cawachi Limited manages drugstores in Japan. The company retails pharmaceuticals, health foods, child care products, cosmetics, daily miscellaneous goods, general food products, confectionery products, etc. It also involved in the insurance business. The company operates 346 drugstores. Cawachi Limited was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Oyama, Japan.

name: AUTOWAVE Co., Ltd.
summary: AUTOWAVE Co., Ltd. sells car supplies through its stores in Japan. The company offers tires and wheels, oils, car audio and navigation products. It also provides car maintenance services, such as vehicle inspection, tire and wheel, oil, sheet metal and repair, body coat, car navigation and audio monitor, battery maintenance, dress up and security product work, and car care club services, as well as purchases and sells cars and offers outdoor season items. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Chiba, Japan.

name: ImageONE Co., Ltd.
summary: ImageONE Co., Ltd. provides healthcare and global environmental business solutions in Japan. The company's Healthcare Solutions Business segment sells medical image storage, distribution, and display systems, ultrasound image reporting systems, cloud-based electronic medical record systems, nuclear medicine dose management systems, medical gloves, PCR detection reagents, antigen test kits, etc., as well as remote image diagnosis and other businesses. The Global Environmental Solutions Business segment sells automatic orthomosaic and 3D processing software for UAV-captured images, etc. It offers medical systems, such as medical software and EHR/EMR, as well as PACS medical image storage, distribution, and display systems; medical supplies, medical gloves, and PCR and antigen test kits; CTs, MRIs, x-rays, and mobile medical trucks; and clinical management support services. The company also provides solar panels and wind turbines; and GEO mapping, GIS solution, and UAV capability services, as well as distributes and reuses EV batteries. In addition, it offers tritium separation technology; tritium continuous measurement; radiation tolerant cameras; viDocRTKrover, a measurement tool that uses tablet terminals; and 3D image processing software for use in construction, civil engineering, and surveying sites. The company serves companies, hospitals, medical institutions, government agencies, and power companies. ImageONE Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Shinagawa, Japan.

name: Tabio Corporation
summary: Tabio Corporation plans, manufactures, wholesales, and retails socks. The company offers toe, plain, ankle, crew, high, over knee high, and parts socks; foot covers and cover socks; tights; short, wedding, and all-through stockings; and sports socks comprising running, golf, soccer and futsal, and yoga socks, as well as leg warmers. It also provides health/beauty socks, including inner, pressure, and cold socks, as well as socks for swelling, foot fatigue, foot odor, shoe slip, and sleep measures; leggings and leggings pants; and fresher, business, ceremonial occasion, suit casual, and long shoe socks. The company was formerly known as DAN Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tabio Corporation in September 2006. Tabio Corporation was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

name: Kanemi Co., Ltd.
summary: Kanemi Co., Ltd. produces and sells boxed meals for convenience stores in Japan. The company also operates retail stores that offer products, such as sushi, deep-fried foods, and other prepared foods. It operates 275 tenant outlets and 3 restaurants. Kanemi Co., Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan. Kanemi Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of FamilyMart UNY Holdings Co., Ltd.

name: YUMEMITSUKETAI Co.,Ltd.
summary: YUMEMITSUKETAI Co.,Ltd. engages in the mail order retail business in Japan. The company is also involved in the nursing care and real estate businesses. YUMEMITSUKETAI Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1980 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Dynac Holdings Corporation
summary: Dynac Holdings Corporation operates and manages multi-business restaurants primarily in Japan. The company engages in the operation and management of various restaurants and drink corners in cultural facilities, such as theaters and music halls; golf courses, ski resorts, and golf club restaurants; and roadside stations and service areas. It also plans and manages various events and parties; and offers catering services. The company operates restaurants primarily under the Hibiki, Uomori, and Toritori names. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 249 stores. The company was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Dynac Holdings Corporation is a subsidiary of Suntory Holdings Limited.

name: Takachiho Koheki Co.,Ltd.
summary: Takachiho Koheki Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates as an electronics technology trading company in Japan and internationally. It offers mechanical component products, including slide rails, cable guides, conston springs, dampers, gas springs, lifting and cylinder lock systems, monitor arms, and other mechanical components; and semiconductor products, such as communication devices, power modules and devices, sensors, connectors, trans, coils, and GPU boards. The company also provides retail security products comprising electronic article surveillance, display product security, image surveillance, image analysis, store management, and remote monitoring systems, as well as source tagging labels for music stores, fashion boutiques, drugstores, general merchandise stores, home centers, and home appliance discounters; and business solution products consisting of WAN/LAN and network security products, as well as office security products, such as access control and properties removal management systems, and IP solutions/IP cameras/NVR systems. In addition, it offers retail solutions, including video sensing cloud service that provides data on customer behavior; cloud computing service, which analyses data; age estimation services for male and female customers; shelf browsing time service, which enables retailers to enhance their sales and display plans; and IQ Lane for zero-wait time checkout service for retail businesses. Further, the company offers and support, maintenance, operation and management, and installation and tuning solutions. Takachiho Koheki Co., Ltd. was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: ASKUL Corporation
summary: ASKUL Corporation provides office supplies mail-order services for individuals and enterprises in Japan. The company was incorporated in 1963 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Uoki Co.,Ltd.
summary: Uoki Co.,Ltd. engages in the retail sale of seafood in Japan. It offers sushi and prepared side dishes. The company also operates restaurants. It operates 41 fresh fish retail stores and 6 restaurants. The company was formerly known as K.K. Uoki Suisan and changed its name to Uoki Co.,Ltd. in 1990. Uoki Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Fujisawa, Japan.

name: Adastria Co., Ltd.
summary: Adastria Co., Ltd. plans, produces, and retails clothes and sundry goods in Japan. It offers women's, men's, and children's apparel; and lifestyle items, including bags, shoes, kitchen and interior goods, and furniture under various brands. As of February 28, 2021, the company operated 1,400 retail stores in Hong Kong, China, Taiwan, South Korea, and the United States. The company was formerly known as Adastria Holdings Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Adastria Co., Ltd. in June 2015. Adastria Co., Ltd. was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Gfoot Co.,Ltd.
summary: Gfoot Co.,Ltd. sells footwear in Japan. It offers men's shoes, ladies' shoes, sports shoes, and imported goods. The company was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: OLBA HEALTHCARE HOLDINGS, Inc.
summary: OLBA HEALTHCARE HOLDINGS, Inc. installs and operates medical device distribution management systems primarily in Japan. The company distributes evidence based medical devices to enhance hospital operation. It also sells and leases home nursing beds, wheelchairs, etc.; and supports home renovation and provides expert consultation services. In addition, the company supports healthcare practices through the provision of optimum medical devices; provides support and response to various medical needs; and proposes procurement efficiency enhancements for hospital operation improvement. Further, it supports the life science field, such as reagents and testing equipment; and enhancements in convenience of patients and operation of clinics. Additionally, it is involved in the import and export operations. The company was formerly known as Kawanishi Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to OLBA HEALTHCARE HOLDINGS, Inc. in January 2021. OLBA HEALTHCARE HOLDINGS, Inc. was founded in 1921 and is headquartered in Okayama, Japan.

name: ITOCHU-SHOKUHIN Co., Ltd.
summary: ITOCHU-SHOKUHIN Co., Ltd. engages in the wholesale of food and liquor products in Japan. The company sells its products to supermarkets, department stores, convenience stores, and other retailers, as well as restaurants, online retailers, wholesalers, and manufactures. It is also involved in the logistics management, storage, transportation, and distribution merchandising businesses; and provision of goods information services. The company was founded in 1886 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan. ITOCHU-SHOKUHIN Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of ITOCHU Corporation.

name: KT Corporation
summary: KT Corporation provides integrated telecommunications and platform services in Korea and internationally. The company offers fixed-line telephone services, including local, domestic long-distance, international long-distance, and voice over Internet protocol telephone services, as well as interconnection services; broadband Internet access service and other Internet-related services; and data communication services, such as fixed-line and leased line services, as well as broadband Internet connection services. It also provides media and content services, including IPTV, satellite TV, digital music, e-commerce, online advertising consulting, and digital comics and novels services; and credit card processing and other financial services. In addition, the company offers information technology and network services, and satellite services; sells handsets and miscellaneous telecommunications equipment; develops and sells residential units and commercial real estate; and rents real estate properties. Further, it maintains public telephones; offers security, B2C and B2B, investment fund, software development and data processing, value added network, system integration and maintenance, mobile marketing, PCS distribution, satellite broadcasting, cloud system implementation, network installation and management, and data center development and related services. Additionally, the company is involved in the Internet banking ASP and security solutions, residential building development and supply, sports group management, technology business finance, software development and supply, submarine cable construction and maintenance, and trunk radio systems businesses. As of December 31, 2020, the company served approximately 22.3 million mobile subscribers and 8.8 million IPTV subscribers. The company was formerly known as Korea Telecom Corp. and changed its name to KT Corporation in March 2002. KT Corporation was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Seongnam, South Korea.

name: G.taste Co.,Ltd.
summary: G.taste Co.,Ltd. operates in the food service industry in Japan. The company is involved in the planning and management of restaurants; and franchise and food processing businesses, as well as consulting business. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

name: Kura Sushi,Inc.
summary: Kura Sushi,Inc. develops and operates a chain of sushi restaurants in Japan, Taiwan, and the United States. As of October 2018, it operates 485 stores. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

name: Kitoku Shinryo Co., Ltd.
summary: Kitoku Shinryo Co., Ltd. develops and sells rice in Japan and internationally. It also sells feed and feed raw materials; develops and sells value-added products, such as protein-adjusted rice; manufactures confectionery and processed food rice flour; and sells glutinous rice and rice flour. The company was founded in 1882 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: OOTOYA Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: OOTOYA Holdings Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, plans, manages and franchises restaurants. Its restaurants primarily offer set meals. As of March 31, 2019, the company operated and franchised 353 stores in Japan and 110 stores internationally. OOTOYA Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Musashino, Japan.

name: Broccoli Co., Ltd.
summary: Broccoli Co., Ltd. operates in the entertainment industry in Japan and internationally. It develops and creates various contents, including comics, animations, games, and music. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Kuze Co., Ltd.
summary: Kuze Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the food wholesale business for food service industries in Japan and internationally. It offers commercial ingredients and materials, such as Italian mix, grated radishes, smoked salmon slice, scrambled eggs, sauces, pork cutlets, kinpira burdock, potato salad, pate de campagne, beef steak slice, beef burger patty, beef hamburger, radish and bamboo shoots, boiled radish and carrot soup stock, extra virgin olive oil, tempura powder, hakata mentaiko barako, sauce fried noodles, fried chicken thighs, wheat scented baguette, shredded cheese, rich white miso, non-oil dressing Japanese style ginger, and grated onion dressing under the Kuze brand. The company also provides chiffon cakes, pound chocolate, danju, shortcakes, mousses, cakes, sponge sheets, base creams, and whipping creams under the Dolceze brand name; and commercial wraps, paper towels, chooking sheets and papers, aluminum foil, alcohol preparation spray bottle, neutral detergent, sterilizer / bleach, liquid detergent, dishwasher rinse, and hand wash. It distributes its products to hotels, halls, restaurants, taverns, fast foods restaurants, catering, delicatessens and prepared dishes, and inflight meal services. In addition, it proposes menus and offers products through catalog-sales system. The company was founded in 1934 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Elematec Corporation
summary: Elematec Corporation supplies electronic parts, materials, and modules for manufacturers of electronic products in Japan and internationally. It offers a range of products that are applied in various electronic products, such as smartphone camera modules, cameras, household electric appliances, video equipment, semiconductors, OA equipment, super computers, health care equipment, automotive equipment, construction equipment, housing equipment, industrial equipment, medical equipment, infrastructure and energy equipment, and toys and hobbies. The company also distributes other products, such as adhesives, tapes, and peltiers. In addition, it offers procurement agency services; processing services comprising screen printing, cutting, and assembling; planning and development services; and quality and environmental services, including inspection of environmentally hazardous substances, identifying and analyzing defects, and quality follow-up services. The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Elematec Corporation is a subsidiary of Toyota Tsusho Corporation.

name: I.K Co.,Ltd.
summary: I.K Co.,Ltd. provides marketing services in Japan. It operates Prime Direct that offers product directly to customers through websites and television shopping slots; SKINFOOD, which provides food cosmetics of a South Korean cosmetic brand through shops. The company also offers cosmetics, apparel goods, shoes, bags, beauty and health products, and other products through co-op stores, mail-order companies, shops, and overseas channels. In addition, it provides IT solutions, including the sale of systems related to the development of contact centers, such as Voistore, a voice call recording system; LINE WORKS, a voice call recording system for businesses; and M-Talk, a chat system. The company operates 21 directly managed stores and 2 franchised stores. I.K Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

name: JALUX Inc.
summary: JALUX Inc. engages in the aviation, life services, retail, and food and beverage businesses worldwide. The company remarkets and sells aircraft, aircraft engines, and flight simulators; provides leased aircraft registration, and aircraft sales and purchasing consultancy services; and offers aircraft components, materials, tools, consumables, and engine components, as well as ground support and airport-related equipment. It also constructs and operates airport terminals and facilities; leases aircrafts and engines; and provides insurance products to corporate and individual customers, and business process outsourcing services. In addition, the company is involved in the handling of bridge inspection vehicles, warm mix foaming equipment, and road repair materials; wholesale of paper materials and pulp, as well as design and printing of catalogs and packaging materials; provision of real estate development, subleasing, management, and agency services; and operation of dormitories and company housings. Further, it operates sumai.jalux.com, a real estate Website; JAL Vacations, a Website, which introduces travelers to resort condominiums; senior apartments and nursery care centers under the Solcias brand; and 11 duty-free shops under the JAL DUTYFREE name; operates and manages JAL Plaza TABITUS+ STATION store; 74 airport shops under the BLUE SKY name; restaurants; and JAL-shopping, an online shop. Additionally, the company plans, designs, and distributes general merchandise, alcohol, tobacco, and cosmetics; imports and sells sea food and agricultural products, wines, and sparkling wines; and plans, develops, and sells in-flight meals, foodstuffs, and beverages. It also provides airport-related facilities and equipment management services; and provides planning, purchasing, and after-sales services for in-flight sales products. ALUX Inc. was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: EDION Corporation
summary: EDION Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a home electrical appliance retailer in Japan. It primarily operates its stores under the Hyakuman Volt brand. As of March 31, 2020, the company operated a total of 1,184 stores, including 433 directly operated stores and 751 franchise stores. It also sells home appliances; operates as a communication Internet service provider; sell mobile phones; and engages in renovation and housing related business, robot programming education business, and energy management system business. EDION Corporation was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

name: Arata Corporation
summary: Arata Corporation engages in the wholesale of daily goods and cosmetics in Japan. The company offers health and beauty products, including cosmetics, hair and body care, and healthcare products; household detergents, such as clothing detergents, home-related cleaners, and dishwashing and kitchen detergents; home care products, including insecticides, air fresheners and deodorizers, and batteries; paper products, which include tissues, toilet paper, and disposable diapers; and home goods comprising kitchen supplies, cleaning equipment, and cooking implements. It is also involved in the wholesale of pet food and accessories, perfumed soaps, tooth pastes, food and beverages, textile products, and miscellaneous goods; and store management activities. Arata Corporation was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Watts Co., Ltd.
summary: Watts Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the wholesale and retail trade of daily necessities and miscellaneous goods in Japan, China, Malaysia, Peru, and internationally. It engages in the wholesale of imported interior products; import and export, and processing business of household goods; and general merchandise retail business. The company operates its stores under the 100-Yen shop brand. It also operates a grocery store under the Buona vita brand; miscellaneous goods under the AMANO brand; and uniform shop under the KOMONOYA and KOMONOKAEN brands. Watts Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

name: Festaria Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Festaria Holdings Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells jewelry and jewelry accessories. The company also imports and sells jewelry. As of August 31, 2018, it operated 87 stores, which included 84 stores in Japan and 3 stores internationally. The company was formerly known as SADAMATSU Company Limited and changed its name to Festaria Holdings Co., Ltd. in March 2018. Festaria Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1920 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Tomen Devices Corporation
summary: Tomen Devices Corporation operates as an electronics trading company in Japan. The company sells semiconductors products and electronic components. Its products include memory semiconductors, including DRAM, FLASH, and MCP; system LSI semiconductors, including ASIC, DDI, and CMOS image sensors; and liquid crystal panels, LEDs, and OLEDs. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Halows Co.,Ltd.
summary: Halows Co.,Ltd. operates a network of supermarket stores in Hiroshima, Okayama, Kagawa, Ehime, Tokushima, and Hyogo Prefectures of Japan. The company was formerly known as Fuchu Supermarket Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Halows Co.,Ltd. in March 1988. Halows Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1958 and is headquartered in Tsukubo, Japan.

name: Pixel Companyz Inc.
summary: Pixel Companyz Inc. engages in the generation and sale of solar power in Japan. The company also develops, constructs, and sells solar power facilities, as well as owns, develops, and sells real estate properties. In addition, it develops, produces, and sells casino gaming machines; and develops and builds systems for the financial industry, as well as provides host, server, client system consultation, and system development services. The company was formerly known as Hybrid Service Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Pixel Companyz Inc. in October 2015. Pixel Companyz Inc. was founded in 1986 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers

name: Hokuyu Lucky Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hokuyu Lucky Co.,Ltd. operates a supermarket primarily in Japan. Its supermarket offers food, clothing, and daily goods. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan.

name: S.Ishimitsu & Co.,Ltd.
summary: S.Ishimitsu & Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture, processing, import, and sale of coffee, tea, liquor, and food in Japan and internationally. It also exports and sells alcoholic beverages, food products, and confectionery products. The company handles coffee beans and tea for drinks; packaged products, including coffee and tea; canned fruits and vegetables; Western food ingredients, such as pasta and olive oil, and frozen foods; chicken related products; and seafoods comprising shrimps, squid, octopus, and others. It also imports and sells fresh vegetables and processed agricultural products to food manufacturers, cut vegetable suppliers, restaurant chains, mass retailers, etc. In addition, the company engages in the provision of Japanese alcoholic beverages, sake, shochu, etc.; and management of an Italian restaurant. S.Ishimitsu & Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1906 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.S.Ishimitsu & Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture, processing, import, and sale of coffee, tea, liquor, and food in Japan and internationally. It also exports and sells alcoholic beverages, food products, and confectionery products. The company handles coffee beans and tea for drinks; packaged products, including coffee and tea; canned fruits and vegetables; Western food ingredients, such as pasta and olive oil, and frozen foods; chicken related products; and seafoods comprising shrimps, squid, octopus, and others. It also imports and sells fresh vegetables and processed agricultural products to food manufacturers, cut vegetable suppliers, restaurant chains, mass retailers, etc. In addition, the company engages in the provision of Japanese alcoholic beverages, sake, shochu, etc.; and management of an Italian restaurant. S.Ishimitsu & Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1906 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.

name: TENPOS HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd.
summary: TENPOS HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd. operates kitchenware and equipment stores in Japan. The company also offers shop layout and interior designing, skills and knowledge leasing, and restaurant operation training services. It operates 31 directly owned and 8 FC Asakuma stores; 3 FC enjoy Kitchen stores; and 2 FC ASAKUMAKITCHEN stores, as well as 2 Farmer's Garden, 5 Na No Ha, and 6 Motsuyaki Ebisu San restaurants. The company was formerly known as Tenpos Busters Co., Ltd. and changed its name to TENPOS HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd. in November 2017. The company was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Fujio Food Group Inc.
summary: Fujio Food Group Inc. operates restaurant chains in Japan and internationally. The company is involved in the management of restaurants and franchise chains; and designing and planning activities related to the interior and exterior of the stores. It operates restaurants under the MaidoOokiniShokudo, KushiyaMonogatari, Kappougi, and Tsurumaru brands, as well as other sub-brands. Fujio Food Group Inc. was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

name: Amiyaki Tei Co., Ltd.
summary: Amiyaki Tei Co., Ltd. operates a chain of restaurants in Japan. It operates through Yakiniku, Yakitori, and Other segments. The Yakiniku segment operates 182 restaurants under the Amiyaki Tei, Karbiya, and Suehiro Kan brand names, which specializes in offering meat. The Yakitori segment operates 55 restaurants under the Ganso Yakitoriya brand, which offers yakitori and kamomeki. The Other segment operates 32 restaurants. Amiyaki Tei Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Kasugai, Japan.

name: Tokatsu Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tokatsu Holdings Co.,Ltd. engages in the sale of automobiles in Japan. The company sells new and used cars. It also provides maintenance services, as well as engages in the life and property insurance agency business; and sheet metal painting business. The company was incorporated in 1969 and is based in Matsudo, Japan.

name: Toshin Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Toshin Group Co.,Ltd. supplies electrical equipment and materials. The company offers high voltage receiving boards, electric wires/cables, terminal processing products, distribution board control panels, VE conduit and accessories, electric circuit and insulating materials, TV hearing and measuring instruments, telephone poles and overhead wires, wood and interior products, lightning rods and equipment, air conditioners and ventilation fans, home appliances, and tools. It also provides high pressure, switch and control, wiring, disaster prevention, acoustic communication, communication, gas, building material housing, and OA equipment. The company was formerly known as Toshin Electric Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Toshin Group Co.,Ltd. in November 2006. Toshin Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: FTGroup Co., Ltd.
summary: FTGroup Co., Ltd. supplies communication devices to small and medium-sized enterprises in Japan and internationally. The company offers business phones, office automation equipment, air conditioning equipment, corporate mobiles, water faucet equipment, marking supplies or printer consumables, LED lights, and photo voltaic systems, as well as optical fiber line, Internet, ISP, and broadband services. It is also involved in the installation, maintenance, and support of communications equipment; and management activities; investment and incubation of venture business; and Web gift and marketing business, as well as remodeling sales and construction activities. In addition, the company engages in the sale of solar and electric power, batteries, EV chargers, and HEMS; OEM/ODM and development business; and network security equipment business. Further, it is involved in mortgage refinance, sales, brokerage, and management of real estate; and insurance business, as well as purchase of used cars, auto leasing, and provision of loans. Additionally, the company operates call centers; and mobile shops, as well as offers multi-payment solutions. FTGroup Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Hiramatsu Inc.
summary: Hiramatsu Inc. operates and manages cafes, restaurants, and hotels in Japan. The company was formerly known as Hiramatsu-Tei Ltd. and changed its name to Hiramatsu Inc. in December 1994. Hiramatsu Inc. was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Fields Corporation
summary: Fields Corporation engages in the content-related businesses in Japan. The company plans, develops, manufactures, sells, and maintains pachinko/pachislot (PS) machines. It is also involved in the planning and development of software for PS machines; management and operation of a fitness gyms; provision of information services through the Internet; and planning and production of CG, etc. In addition, the company engages in the planning and production of movie/TV; and planning, production, and sale of character goods. Further, it manages, leases, and trades in real estate assets. The company was formerly known as Toyo Shoji Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Fields Corporation in October 2001. Fields Corporation was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Sojitz Corporation
summary: Sojitz Corporation operates as a general trading company. It offers automotive parts and components; supply chain management; and auto-financing services, as well as internet and digital technologies. The company also provides aircraft leasing/part-out; engineering, procurement, and construction; cargo transport infrastructure; sales representation for commercial/defense; business jet; airport management; railcar maintenance, repair, and overhaul; energy management, system integration, software development, and cloud and managed; and daycare and after-school care management services. In addition, it engages in the medical infrastructure, surface mounter sales, and plant project; new building, secondhand ships, ship chartering, and ship equipment and owning; and tuna and vegetable farming, confectionery, bakery, and grain port businesses. Further, the company constructs, operates, and generates solar, wind, biomass, and gas fired power; LNG plant; LNG receiving and regasification terminals, as well as constructs network for telecommunication carriers; and data centers. Additionally, it mines and smelts coal, and rare and non-ferrous metals; prints 3D metal; and offers exfoliated vermiculite. The company also trades in ferrous materials, thermal coal, non-ferrous and precious metals, and industrial minerals and steel production materials; methanol, plastic resins, industrial salts, C5 and petroleum resins, and rare earths; livestock feed raw materials; industrial machinery and bearings; and carbon products. In addition, it refines sugar; produces and sells fertilizers, feed, woodchip, and meat products; retail foods; invests in and manages shopping centers; distributes building materials, brand and consumer goods, and still products; sells textiles; mills flour; develops industrial park, condominiums, offices, shopping centers, and urban infrastructure; and offers communications and IT equipment. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Village Vanguard CO.,LTD.
summary: Village Vanguard CO.,LTD. engages in the retail of display merchandise, books, miscellaneous goods, and CD/DVDs. It operates approximately 389 stores. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

name: Mutual Corporation
summary: Mutual Corporation designs, manufactures, sells, imports, and exports manufacturing equipment and automated packaging machines for pharmaceutical and cosmetic products primarily in Japan. The company offers packaging machines, including PTP packaging and strip packaging machines; cartoners; RSS code printing / inspection device, labelers, casers, overwrappers, cushioning material insertion machine, and corrugated board packaging machine. It also provides formulation machines consisting of container molding and filling sealing machine, liquid filler capper, tablet printing machine, liquid /powder filler, and emulsifying and dispersing machine. In addition, it also provides inspection /cleaning machines comprising operation status monitoring system, near-infrared heterogeneous tablet inspection device, PTP packaging & foreign matter inspection machine, tablet printing/inspection machine ,pinhole detection machine for pharmaceutical and food industry, rubber stopper inspection machine, powder/granule foreign matter inspection machine, and rubber stopper washer, as well as provides diamond tool manufacturing equipment. In addition, Mutual Corporation designs and manufactures machines for facility lines; installs and runs adjustments for machines; imports and sells industrial-use diamonds; and provides maintenance services. The company was formerly known as Mutual Trading Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Mutual Corporation in April 1983. Mutual Corporation was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

name: SHINTO Holdings, Inc.
summary: SHINTO Holdings, Inc. engages in the wholesale of apparel in Japan. The company is also involved in the underwear, uniform, trading, and brand licensing business, as well as offers beauty serum face mask products. In addition, it engages in the purchase, sale, and management of real estate properties; and provides real estate services, including concierge, property information, delivery, and tax consultation. The company serves specialty stores, mass retailers, sports mass retailers, etc. It offers its products under the Modern Amusement, RUSS-K, and CONART brands. The company was formerly known as Crymson Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Shinto Holdings, Inc. in October 2017. Shinto Holdings, Inc. was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: CASSINA IXC. Ltd.
summary: CASSINA IXC. Ltd. plans, manufactures, imports, and sells furniture and house holding articles in Japan. The company offers sofas/benches, chair stools, table consoles, desks, storage products/TV boards, outdoor products, beds, mirrors, dresser hangers, illumination products, rugs, curtains/fabrics, art products, household goods, and quilt linen. It also provides interior design and office planning services. CASSINA IXC. Ltd. sells its products through its shops. The company was formerly known as Cassina Japan Inc. and changed its name to CASSINA IXC. Ltd. in May 2002. CASSINA IXC. Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Palemo Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Palemo Holdings Co.,Ltd. owns and operates a chain of specialty stores for women's apparel, variety goods, and bags in Japan. The company is also involved in the delivery agency business. As of February 20, 2020, it operated 487 stores. The company was formerly known as Palemo Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Palemo Holdings Co.,Ltd. in August 2017. The company was incorporated in 1976 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

name: Komehyo Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Komehyo Holdings Co.,Ltd. engages in the purchase and sale of used and new products through stores in Japan. The company offers jewelry, metals, clocks, bags, cloths, cameras, musical instruments, and other stocks, as well as car tire, aluminum wheel, and auto equipment. It is also involved in the lease of real estate properties. The company was founded in 1947 and is based in Nagoya, Japan.

name: Seria Co., Ltd.
summary: Seria Co., Ltd. operates merchandise stores in Japan. As of March 31, 2019, it operated 1,592 stores comprising 1,543 directly managed stores and 49 franchise chain stores. The company was formerly known as Sanyo Agency Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Seria Co., Ltd. in April 2003. Seria Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Ogaki, Japan.

name: Alfresa Holdings Corporation
summary: Alfresa Holdings Corporation, through its subsidiaries, engages in the wholesale, manufacture, marketing, and import/export of pharmaceuticals, diagnostic reagents, and medical devices/equipment in japan. It engages in the ethical pharmaceuticals wholesaling business that offers diagnostic reagents and medical devices/equipment to hospitals, clinics, and dispensing pharmacies. The company also engages in self-medication products wholesaling business that offers over-the-counter drugs, including health foods, supplements, and other products to drug stores and pharmacies. In addition, it manufactures and markets active pharmaceutical ingredients, pharmaceuticals, diagnostic reagents, and medical devices. Further, the company's medical-related business includes its dispensing pharmacy and other medical-related activities. Alfresa Holdings Corporation was founded in 2003 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Karula Co.,LTD.
summary: Karula Co.,LTD. operates Japanese style family restaurants in Japan. As of September 30, 2020, it operated 120 stores in Tohoku and Kita-Kantou regions, including 93 Japanese-style restaurant Marumatsu stores; 6 Soba restaurant Marumatsu stores; 4 Katsu gourmet stores; 3 Crab Masamune stores; 3 Joshoan stores; 1 Jushoan Marumatsu store; 1 Rotating sushi store; and 12 Shabu Masamune and other stores. The company was formerly known as Marumatsu Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Karula Co.,LTD. in March 1991. Karula Co.,LTD. was founded in 1910 and is headquartered in Tomiya, Japan.

name: NAFCO Co., Ltd.
summary: NAFCO Co., Ltd. operates a chain of home and furniture retail outlets in Japan. Its furniture/home fashion stores offer kitchen and dining, living room, bed and bedroom, study room, and wedding gift furniture; and bedding products, small furniture, and other items. The company also operates home centers that offer DIY hardware, gardening products, exterior and interior furnishings, automobile accessories, and pet goods. In addition, it operates combination stores that provide general furniture, interior and furnishings, DIY hardware, gardening merchandises, automobile and car accessories, and pet goods. As of March 31, 2021, it operated 357 stores. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Kitakyushu, Japan.

name: Daikokutenbussan Co.,Ltd.
summary: Daikokutenbussan Co.,Ltd. engages in the retail of foodstuffs, fresh food, convenience goods, and other products. It is also involved in the wholesale of food products. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Kurashiki, Japan.

name: Honeys Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Honeys Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in the planning, manufacture, sale and wholesale of women's clothing and fashion accessories. It offers products under the GLACIER, Cinema club, and Colza brand names. The company also provides products through stores and online shopping sites. Honeys Holdings Co., Ltd. was formerly known as Honeys Co. Ltd. and changed its name to Honeys Holdings Co., Ltd. in March 2017. The company was incorporated in 1978 and is headquartered in Iwaki, Japan.

name: Nippon Primex Inc.
summary: Nippon Primex Inc. manufactures and sells printers and other electronic equipment in Japan. It offers kiosk, mobile and portable, and POS printers; mechanism and control boards; and options and accessories, such as power supplies, paper presenters, paper bezels, paper holders, and cash drawers. The company also provides software supporting tools; and printer drivers. In addition, it engages in the controlling, buying, and selling of real estate properties. The company also exports its kiosk printers to the United States, the European Union, and internationally. Nippon Primex Inc. was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Pharmarise Holdings Corporation
summary: Pharmarise Holdings Corporation manages dispensing pharmacies in Japan. Its dispensing pharmacies provide patients with dispensing services based on prescriptions drawn up by medical institutions. The company also manages drug stores and convenience stores; and sells cosmetics. In addition, it is involved in the storage and management of medical examination records of patients on behalf of medical institutions; operation of medical mall; and provision of temporary help, and stationery and office furniture. As of June 1, 2018, the company operated 308 pharmacies. Pharmarise Holdings Corporation was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Y's Table Corporation
summary: Y's Table Corporation plans, develops, and operates various restaurants in Japan and internationally. As of May 31, 2020, it operated 52 directly managed stores and 48 FC franchise stores. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Kikkoman Corp.
summary: Kikkoman Corporation, through its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells food products in Japan, North America, and internationally. The company offers soy sauces, soy sauce soup bases, dipping and marinade sauces, handy seasoning mixes, and Del Monte seasonings; soy milk and Del Monte beverages; sweet sake for cooking; and wines. It also manufactures and sells canned fruits, canned corn, and tomato ketchup, as well as health foods; and purchases and sells oriental food products. In addition, the company produces and sells clinical diagnostic reagents, hygiene inspection agents, and processing enzymes, as well as chemical products, including hyaluronic acid; and offers real estate rental, logistics, and back-office support services. It serves home, and industrial and food service sectors. The company was formerly known as Kikkoman Shoyu Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kikkoman Corporation in 1980. Kikkoman Corporation was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Noda, Japan.

name: Ajinomoto Co., Inc.
summary: Ajinomoto Co., Inc. engages in the seasonings and foods, frozen foods, and healthcare and other businesses in Japan and internationally.
